content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/utils/components/SysprepModal/sysprep-autounattend/SysprepAutounattendHelperPopup.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 27, 44
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 27):
   26                size="sm"
   27                variant="link"
   28              >

  (line 44):
   43          isInline
   44          variant="link"
   45        >

```

### Fix 2
Lines: 22, 39
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: react-i18next
  parentName: Trans

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 22):
   21              </Text>
   22              <Button
   23                icon={<ExternalLinkSquareAltIcon />}

  (line 39):
   38      >
   39        <Button
   40          aria-label={t('Help')}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 6
Rule [sd-test-popover-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Popover is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Popover renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Popover may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Popover
  localName: Popover
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Code context:
```
    5  import { useKubevirtTranslation } from '@kubevirt-utils/hooks/useKubevirtTranslation';
    6  import { Button, Popover, Text, TextVariants } from '@patternfly/react-core';
    7  import { ExternalLinkSquareAltIcon, OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon } from '@patternfly/react-icons';

```

### Fix 4
Line: 6
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-text-text-d-ts-textvariants-removed]:
Type-alias 'TextVariants' was removed (type-alias): Exported enum `TextVariants` was removed — migrate to `ContentVariants`.
  Matching props (use on `ContentVariants` instead): a, blockquote, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p, pre, small

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Text/Text.d.ts
Before: enum: TextVariants

Incident context:
  importedName: TextVariants
  localName: TextVariants
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
From: TextVariants
To: ContentVariants
Replacement: ContentVariants
Member mappings:
  h2 -> h2
  h4 -> h4
  h6 -> h6
  small -> small
  blockquote -> blockquote
  pre -> pre
  a -> a
  h5 -> h5
  h1 -> h1
  p -> p
  h3 -> h3

Code context:
```
    5  import { useKubevirtTranslation } from '@kubevirt-utils/hooks/useKubevirtTranslation';
    6  import { Button, Popover, Text, TextVariants } from '@patternfly/react-core';
    7  import { ExternalLinkSquareAltIcon, OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon } from '@patternfly/react-icons';

```

### Fix 5
Line: 6
Rule [semver-text-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <Text> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - Text.ouiaId  →  Content.ouiaId
  - Text.component  →  Content.component
  - Text.className  →  Content.className
  - Text.ouiaSafe  →  Content.ouiaSafe
  - Text.children  →  Content.children
  - Text.isVisitedLink  →  Content.isVisitedLink

Remove <Text> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove Text from the import statement.

Incident context:
  importedName: Text
  localName: Text
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```
    5  import { useKubevirtTranslation } from '@kubevirt-utils/hooks/useKubevirtTranslation';
    6  import { Button, Popover, Text, TextVariants } from '@patternfly/react-core';
    7  import { ExternalLinkSquareAltIcon, OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon } from '@patternfly/react-icons';

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/utils/components/SysprepModal/sysprep-autounattend/SysprepAutounattendHelperPopup.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

**Fix 1** (Lines 27, 44 - `Button.variant` type changed): The value `"link"` is still valid in both old and new type unions. No change needed.

**Fix 2** (Lines 22, 39 - icon children to prop): 
- Line 22-32: The `<Button>` at line 22 already has `icon={<ExternalLinkSquareAltIcon />}` as a prop (line 23). This fix is already applied.
- Line 39-47: The `<Button>` at line 39 has `<OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon>` as its only child (line 46). This is icon-only, so I need to move it to the `icon` prop and make it self-closing.

**Fix 3** (Line 6 - Popover behavioral changes): This is a test-impact advisory about Popover's sub-component changes. No code change needed in the source file itself (only tests would need updating).

**Fix 4** (Line 6 - `TextVariants` removed, replace with `ContentVariants`): Replace `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants` in import and all usages (lines 16, 17).

**Fix 5** (Line 6 - `Text` replaced by `Content`): Replace `Text` with `Content` in import and all JSX usages (lines 16, 17).

Let me apply all changes:

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **Already valid** | The value `"link"` exists in both the old and new type unions. No change needed. |
| Fix 2 | Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>` | **Applied** | Line 22: already had `icon={<ExternalLinkSquareAltIcon />}` as a prop (previously applied). Line 39: moved `<OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon className="co-field-level-help__icon" />` from children to the `icon` prop and made the `<Button>` self-closing. |
| Fix 3 | Popover transitive behavioral changes | **No source change needed** | This is a test-impact advisory about Popover's sub-component default changes. No source code change required; only test files would need updates. |
| Fix 4 | `TextVariants` removed → `ContentVariants` | **Applied** | Replaced `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants` in the import (line 6) and all usages (lines 16, 17). |
| Fix 5 | `Text` replaced by `Content` | **Applied** | Replaced `Text` with `Content` in the import (line 6) and all JSX usages (lines 16, 17 — both opening and closing tags). |
